results.title: Paddleboarders find cool escape from summer heat
results.description: With the temperature nearing 100 degrees Friday afternoon, some Southern Illinois residents headed to Cedar Lake in search of relief from the heat.

results.title: Perry trains as Aussies ramp up World Cup final preparation
results.description: Positive signs as Ellyse Perry batted in the nets during Australia's first pre-final training session following "wellness day"

results.title: Egypt progress to FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16 after thrilling win over Australia in penalties
results.description: Egypt defeated Australia 4–2 in a penalty shootout after a 1–1 draw in regulation and extra time in their FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 clash on July 3. With the win, the Mohamad Salah-led side advanced to the Round of 16 after a tense and dramatic knockout contest decided from the spot.

results.title: Heat will be to Paraguay's advantage against France, says coach
results.description: PHILADELPHIA, July 3 : Paraguay manager Gustavo Alfaro suggested the extreme heat predicted for Saturday's World Cup round-of-16 match against heavily favoured France could help his side, but only so much.High temperatures around 100 degrees Fahrenheit (37.8 degrees Celsius) with significant humidity are fore

results.title: Egypt hold nerve in shoot-out to sink Australia and reach last 16
results.description: Socceroos crumble on penalties after surviving relentless late Egyptian press

results.title: Athletics Designate Matt Krook, Geoff Hartlieb For Assignment
results.description: The Athletics announced that left-hander José Suarez has been reinstated from the paternity list and righty Mark Leiter Jr. from the 15-day injured list.

results.title: Gavin McKenna, Maple Leafs Agree to Entry-Level Contract After No. 1 NHL Draft Pick
Is Australia out of World Cup after loss to Egypt?
results.description: Australia's World Cup run came to an end in the Round of 32 after a penalty kick loss to Egypt. See the Aussie's full World Cup route here.
